projects.title: Comando 99
projects.description: A bold, edgy landing page for an arma 3 community made to practice modern design principles. Features an army-inspired aesthetic with sharp typography and aggressive visual elements.

projects.title: Tenzies
projects.description: An interactive dice game built with React where players roll until all dice show the same number. Implements real-time timer functionality and persistent high score tracking using localStorage and React hooks.
